mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gvrnr_mng_sys_app_transaction_progress ( transaction_id, progress_percent, progress_message, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{transactionId} AS UUID), #{progressPercent}, #{progressMessage}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (transaction_id) DO UPDATE SET progress_percent = EXCLUDED.progress_percent, progress_message = EXCLUDED.progress_message, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
